text:
Assassin F was one of the assassins hired by the Ten Dons to eliminate the Phantom Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 95 

Appearance

Assassin F was a young man with a lean build with a scar running down his right eye, and short hair. He wore a hoodie over a plain shirt with pants and boots. 

Personality

Assassin F was the first to choose a color code name after suggesting the idea. Kurapika said that along with the other assassins (besides Assassin A and Assassin B), Assassin F was intimidated by Silva and Zeno Zoldyck. Assassin F became understandably anxious when the Zoldycks revealed their identities. However, he was also curious and confident enough to ask Zeno multiple questions. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Assassin F is one of the assassins hired by the Ten Dons to eliminate the Phantom Troupe. Assassin D suggests picking code names for each other and Assassin E adds that colors should work. After Assassin F asks to be called "Blue", Assassin C says that he wants to be "Red". After Silva and Zeno introduce themselves, Assassin F recognizes their names and realizes that they are the legendary assassins no one has never seen. Zeno tells them that they aren't in hiding and don't use disguises. Assassin F is taken aback that Zoldyck is their real last name and not an alias. Zeno gives the young man a card his his address and phone number, offering a 30% discount if he needs anyone killed. 

During his search for Chrollo in the Cemetery Building, Assassin A follows a faint trail of blood to a room where Assassin F is tied to a chair with multiple pens stabbed into his legs and a pool of blood at his feet. After Assassin A throws a knife into his chest to confirm that he's dead, Chrollo peers out from behind Assassin F and removes another pen from his head. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 96 

Abilities & Powers

Since the Ten Dons hired him to eliminate the Phantom Troupe, it can be inferred that he was at least strong enough to be recognized as suitable for the job. However, none of his abilities were ever shown.

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga or anime adaptations.
